name: Laisky MCP
description: Remote MCP server for AI agents that need web search, rendered fetch, user request queues, FileIO storage, memory lifecycle tools, RAG extraction, and auditable call logs.

authentication.instructions: Send Authorization: Bearer <api key> on MCP initialize, tools/list, and tools/call requests.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the public web with Google Programmable Search and return structured URL, title, snippet, and timestamp results.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch and render a dynamic web page, optionally returning markdown suitable for agent context.

tools.name: get_user_request
tools.description: Retrieve the latest queued human directive for the bearer token and task_id, then mark it consumed.

task_id.description: Queue isolation key. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read a project-scoped file from the remote FileIO workspace.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: file_write
tools.description: Write project-scoped content into the remote FileIO workspace for durable agent context.

tools.name: memory_before_turn
tools.description: Recall server-side memory and prepare model input before an agent turn.

tools.name: extract_key_info
tools.description: Chunk supplied materials, rank them for a query with retrieval techniques, and return the most relevant context passages.

tools.name: file_stat
tools.description: Inspect metadata for a project-scoped FileIO path before reading, writing, moving, or deleting it.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: file_list
tools.description: List files and directories under a project-scoped FileIO path with configurable traversal depth.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: file_search
tools.description: Search project-scoped FileIO memory for relevant files or chunks using the configured memory backend.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: file_delete
tools.description: Delete a project-scoped FileIO file or directory after the agent has confirmed the target is correct.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: file_rename
tools.description: Move or rename a project-scoped FileIO file or directory while preserving shared remote context.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: find_tool
tools.description: Search the live MCP tool catalog by keyword or semantic intent when an agent is unsure which tool to call.

tools.name: mcp_pipe
tools.description: Execute a controlled sequence of MCP tool calls with variable substitution for multi-step agent workflows.

tools.name: memory_after_turn
tools.description: Persist useful outcomes after an agent turn so future agents can reuse project knowledge.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: memory_run_maintenance
tools.description: Run maintenance over stored project memory to compact, refresh, or clean durable agent context.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.

tools.name: memory_list_dir_with_abstract
tools.description: List memory directory entries with abstracts so an agent can choose relevant context without reading every file.

project.description: Project namespace. Use graphql for this repository.
